name: Ansible-Executor
introduction: Ansible Executor is a lightweight RPC sidecar that executes Ansible ad-hoc commands and playbooks through NATS.

default_config.nats:
nats:
  servers:
    - "${NATS_PROTOCOL}://${NATS_SERVERS}"
  username: "${NATS_ADMIN_USERNAME}"
  password: "${NATS_ADMIN_PASSWORD}"
  protocol: "${NATS_PROTOCOL}"
  instance_id: "${node.id}"
  connect_timeout: 5

{% if NATS_PROTOCOL == "tls" %}
  tls_ca_file: "${NATS_TLS_CA_FILE}"
{% endif %}

runtime:
  max_workers: 4
  callback_timeout: 10
  work_dir: "/tmp/ansible-executor"
  state_db_path: "/tmp/ansible-executor/task_state.db"

jetstream:
  namespace: "bk.ans_exec"
  max_deliver: 5
  ack_wait: 300
  backoff: [5, 15, 30, 60]
  dlq_subject: "bk.ans_exec.tasks.dlq"
